_comment: Nostr relay filter config for lightning.bawee.site (FEAT-210). Drop this into your relay's config as the event kind allowlist. Only Lightning-relevant event kinds are accepted — keeps storage lean and the marketplace signal-to-noise high.

_kind_notes.39735: LSP liquidity offer (Kind 39735, parameterised replaceable) — the core marketplace event
_kind_notes.9735: Zap receipt — proof of Lightning payment; used to verify featured listings
_kind_notes.30078: App-specific data — wallet metadata, operator config blobs
_kind_notes.1: Short text note — optional; enables basic social context for LSP reputation
_kind_notes.7: Reaction — optional; allows thumbs-up on LSP offers as informal trust signal
_kind_notes.0: Metadata (profile) — needed so operator npubs resolve to human-readable names
_kind_notes.3: Contact list — optional; enables social graph trust scoring

kind_39735.note: Only the latest event per (pubkey, d-tag) is kept; expired offers (created_at + expiry_blocks*600 < now) are pruned by the relay janitor.
